zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair於大約1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安時，她的父親Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney47歲，母親Jean Haliburton33歲。她於1411年5月1日與William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1462年在蘇格蘭享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair于大约1390年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安时，她的父亲Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney47岁，母亲Jean Haliburton33岁。她于1411年5月1日与William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick在苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1462年在苏格兰享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair was born about 1390, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, was 47 and her mother, Jean Haliburton, was 33. She married William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick on 1 May 1411, in Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1462, in Scotland, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair est née environ 1390, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Jean Haliburton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick le 1 mai 1411, à Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1462, à Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland: Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair um 1390 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney 47 und ihre Mutter Jean Haliburton 33. Sie hat am 1. Mai 1411 in Midlothian, Scotland William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1462 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Scotland.

Lei sposato William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick il 1 maggio 1411, nel Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1462, nel Scotland, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclairが約1390年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkneyは47歳，母Jean Haliburtonは33歳であった。1411年5月1日にスコットランドミドロスアンでWilliam Borthwick 2nd of Borthwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1462年にスコットランドで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean Haliburton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1411년 5월 1일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1462년 스컷랜드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick em 1 de maio de 1411, em Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1462, em Scotland, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair родилась около 1390 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 1st Earl of Orkney было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean Haliburton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick 1 мая 1411 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1462 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет.
